qids.subject: Operating System
qids.prose: A system contains three programs and each requires three tape units for its operation. The minimum number of tape units which the system must have such that deadlocks never arise is _________.

qids.subject: Operating System
qids.prose: A system has identical resources and processes competing for them. Each process can request at most resources. Which one of the following values of could lead to a deadlock? A. B. C. D.

qids.subject: Operating System
qids.prose: Consider the following policies for preventing deadlock in a system with mutually exclusive resources. I. Process should acquire all their resources at the beginning of execution. qids.prose: A system shares tape drives. The current allocation and maximum requirement of tape drives for that processes are shown below: Which of the following best describes current state of the system? A. Safe, Deadlocked B. Safe, Not Deadlocked C. Not Safe, Deadlocked D. Not Safe, Not Deadlocked
